message:
test(labruntime): port recorder_storage tests to RuntimeFixture (ft-22x4r)

Port 40 tokio::test functions from recorder_storage.rs to asupersync
RuntimeFixture: append-log storage, checkpoint management, torn-tail
recovery, idempotency cache, health/lag metrics, durability levels,
request validation, and reopen persistence.

All 56 tests pass (40 ported + 16 common module tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
